title: ChunkManifest
description: Declarative chunk manifest. A world's chunk set is the list of these manifests. Each manifest points to a content-addressed asset blob via `asset_cid`.

asset_cid.description: Content address of the backing asset blob (mesh, lightmap, etc.).

kind.description: Semantic classification; controls which runtime pipeline consumes the chunk.

lod.description: LOD level represented by this manifest. Multiple manifests may share a `coord` if they differ in `lod`.

prefetch_distance_meters.description: Minimum world-space distance at which the chunk can be prefetched.

size_bytes.description: Byte size of the backing asset (hint for streaming scheduler).

tags.description: Free-form tags for authoring and agent filtering.

ChunkCoord.description:
Integer grid coordinate identifying a chunk.

A world is laid out on a 3-dimensional integer grid with configurable cell size (see [`ChunkManifest::cell_size_meters`]). Two chunks with the same `ChunkCoord` collide; the manifest must enforce uniqueness.
